CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF OCT-12-2007 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

LAW AND MOTION, 302, RULING - THE MATTER WAS DISCUSSED. HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION - JUDGMENT DEBTOR GAERLAN'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF HAS NOT CARRIED HER BURDEN OF SHOWING THAT ALL EARNINGS ARE EXEMPT. (CCP 703.580.) THE COURT ORDERS THE LOS ANGELES COUNTY SHERRIFF'S DEPARTMENT TO RELEASE THE LEVIED FUNDS TO THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR. TWENTY FIVE DOLLARS ARE ORDERED TO BE WITHHELD FROM DEBTOR'S EARNINGS PER PAY PERIOD UNTIL THE DEBT IS SATISFIED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185

calendar.matters:
Hearing On Claim Of Exemption; Opposition
Off Calendar Oct-01-2013 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - BERNADETTE GAERLAN, TEL. NO. 254-2335, DEFENDANT APPEARING IN PRO PER;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE MATTER WAS DISCUSSED. Hearing On Claim Of Exemption - Judgment Debtor Gaerlan's claim of exemption is denied. Plaintiff has not carried her burden of showing that all earnings are exempt. (CCP 703.580.) The Court orders the Los Angeles County Sherriff's Department to release the levied funds to the Judgment debtor. Twenty five dollars are ordered to be withheld from Debtor's earnings per pay period until the debt is satisfied. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)

Hrg On Claim Of Exemption; Opposition
Off Calendar Oct-01-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances on this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling: Plaintiff CAPITAL ONE BANK'S Hearing On Claim Of Exemption is transferred to the Law and Motion calendar to be heard at 9:30 a.m. on the same date. Judge Pro Tem: Ernst A. Halperin; Clerk L. Fong; matter not reported. (302/JPT)
